hooks.command: git fetch origin main 2>/dev/null; BRANCH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.head' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$BRANCH" ] || [ "$BRANCH" = "null" ] && BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current); if ! git merge-tree --write-tree origin/main "$BRANCH" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Branch has merge conflicts with main. Run: git fetch origin main && git merge origin/main — resolve conflicts, commit, and push before creating the PR."}'; else echo '{"decision":"allow","reason":"Branch merges cleanly with main."}'; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Checking for merge conflicts with main...
